# Hawkhurst Taxis

> Fixed-price airport taxi service based in Hawkhurst, Kent, covering Gatwick, Heathrow, Stansted, Luton, and London City airports, plus villages across the Weald.

## Key facts
- Fixed prices, no meters: Gatwick £97, Heathrow £133, Stansted £130, Luton £170, London City £130
- Available 24/7, including bank holidays and Christmas
- Real-time flight tracking on all return pickups
- Cash or card accepted, no surcharges
- Phone: 07808 065 494
- Email: clinetaxi@gmail.com
- Service area: Hawkhurst, Cranbrook, Goudhurst, Sandhurst, Tunbridge Wells, and surrounding Kent and Sussex villages

- Home: https://hawkhurtairporttaxis.co.uk/

- Stansted Airport: https://hawkhurtairporttaxis.co.uk/stansted-taxi.html
- Luton Airport: https://hawkhurtairporttaxis.co.uk/luton-taxi.html
- London City Airport: https://hawkhurtairporttaxis.co.uk/london-city-taxi.html

- Blog: https://hawkhurtairporttaxis.co.uk/blog/
